fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the information about the type of document. There are four options:

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number associated with the document. For example, if you have created an invoice, the field Specifies the invoice number.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number that is linked to the document. Numbers are created sequentially.

fields.name: Quantity Transferred
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity transferred from the project planning line to the invoice or credit memo.

fields.name: Transferred Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the invoice or credit document was created. The date is set to the posting date you specified when you created the invoice or credit memo.

fields.name: Invoiced Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the invoice or credit memo was posted.

fields.name: Invoiced Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount (LCY) that was posted from the invoice or credit memo. The amount is calculated based on Quantity, Line Discount %, and Unit Price.

fields.name: Invoiced Cost Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the unit costs that has been posted from the invoice or credit memo. The amount is calculated based on Quantity, Unit Cost, and Line Discount %.

fields.name: Job Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a link to the project ledger entry that was created when the document was posted.
